context: Evaluates DDD modeling in Rails: use of Value Objects (POROs), Entity/Aggregate distinction, and proper service extraction without over-engineering.

checklist.name: Value Object Pattern
checklist.description: Address is implemented as a stateless PORO (Value Object), not a separate ActiveRecord table.

checklist.name: Domain Service Extraction
checklist.description: Carrier selection logic is moved to a specialized Domain Service, keeping models focused on data/state.

checklist.name: Immutable Value Objects
checklist.description: The Address object is immutable (attributes set at init, no setters).

checklist.name: Entity Identification
checklist.description: Shipment is correctly identified as an Entity with its own lifecycle and identity.

checklist.name: Idiomatic Rails Integration
checklist.description: Uses Rails conventions (like composed_of or similar) to integrate Value Objects into ActiveRecord.

checklist.name: Boundary Enforcement
checklist.description: The logic demonstrates clear boundaries; shipping rules do not leak back into the Order model.
